ArrowLeft => Number/clamp(value: control_x - 8, min: 0, max: 100)
ArrowUp => Number/clamp(value: control_x - 8, min: 0, max: 100)
ArrowRight => Number/clamp(value: control_x + 8, min: 0, max: 100)
ArrowDown => Number/clamp(value: control_x + 8, min: 0, max: 100)
__ => control_x
}
